positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a whimsical, glowing celestial animal, perhaps a fox or a winged cat, leaping over a stylized crescent moon and constellation clusters. The design should be framed within a clean, circular medallion composition, highly suitable for screen printing on apparel. Use a limited, ethereal color palette of deep indigo, soft gold, and midnight blue against a stark white background. Emphasis on flowing, elegant silhouettes and delicate linework with high contrast. Inspired by Art Nouveau geometry and celestial mapping, clean vector aesthetic, highly detailed, print-ready, centered, symmetrical composition.
negative: blur, low resolution, bad anatomy, ugly, text, watermark, signature, noise, artifacts, cropped, extra limbs, messy lines, gradient, realism, photorealistic
